structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-08-25 Home in Five Platinum Returns for Non-Targeted Areas Tomorrow
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-08-25 09:44:37-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Home in Five Platinum funds, available for Maricopa County properties, will be available starting Tuesday, August 26th, 2025, for non-targeted areas. Funds for targeted area reservations continue to be available. 

 

Channel: Banked

Product Type: DPA

Guidelines <https://www.ehousingplus.com/home-in-5-platinum/program-highlights/> 

Rate: 6.09%   

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	Down payment assistance in the form of a 4% , 7-year forgivable second mortgage 
*	640+ FICO (660+ for MFH)
*	Manufactured homes permitted (no single-wide properties)

 

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	Eligible in all of Maricopa County, AZ, including the City of Phoenix and excluding City of Paradise Valley
*	Funding is limited and is allocated on a first-come, first-served basis

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

For inquiries, contact:

 

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Dept <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
